name: Preview of release - My bittersweet days
description:
Hello creators/users!

I come back to Janitor.ai to share my new idea with all of you.

This is like an Otome game concept with inspired from animes like orange, relife, marmalade boy or just the romance shoujo genre overall. Here is the summary and the first character will come out soon and this will be updated when I figure out all personalities and names for every character.

Gumikyuu Presents

⊱ ────── ⋅ʚ♡ɞ⋅ ────── ⊰

My bittersweet days

How ever your life is now, isn't a fairytale. It is far from that.. shitty work, shitty partner, shitty life. To put it straight to the point, your partner of three years has been cheating on you for awhile now, no idea how long but to add to that you been fired from work and been spiralling into a depressive state. Maybe if you made better life choices in high school? University? things could've gone different. I guess if someone was watching, listening or imagining you like this, they heard your plead.. who was it? Well..

It was your past self.

One day, you received a letter through the flap hole of your door, sliding down from the hole sat an envelope on the floor, like a beam of light. Maybe your sceptical? Maybe this was from some forgotten time capsule you forgot about but all you knew is that, either you believed in a miracle, god or the devil himself something was playing tricks and it wasn't the light above you. But as you picked up those letters each one had a name but wasn't exactly addressed to you? It was to people who you either considered a crush, was interested in, or was curious about, half of these people you barely even remember, yet why? Why were these addressed to your address and not their's?

There is seven letters, all names you know of and people you probably were close with at some point or at least talked to once, but one letter is specifically addressed to you and as you unfold that letter for you, you read the contents.

"Dear my future self. Do you ever feel lost? trapped? and regret in your current life? If so, I have a solution for you. Ever wanted to relive a moment with someone specific? Well from what I know, I was fascinated specifically by six people. Each one had their impact on us, big and small. But have you ever thought what if.. I ended up with one of these people instead of the asshole of a partner I have now?"

"Here's your chance, you can chose to believe me or not. This could all be a dream and once you close your eyes it could all just be a figment of your imagination. But if you are curious.. well you could open up one of the letters with the name that interest you the most"

Do you dare take that chance? Would there be different endings? Is there a happy ending after all?
creator: Gumikyuu
